nodes.context: American white supremacist prison gang active in and out of prison, formed in 1995 at Denver County Jail.
Colorado prison gang that merged with 211 Crew.

nodes.original_text_name: ANP (American Nazi Party but no relation to the group founded by Rockwell)
nodes.context: Colorado prison gang that merged with 211 Crew; distinct from the original American Nazi Party.
Street gang; Benjamin Davis was a former member.
White supremacist prison gang; a member sent a threatening letter linking 211 Crew to assassinations.

edges.evidence_quote: Eventually 2-11 merged with the Colorado prison gangs Aryan Syndicate and ANP (American Nazi Party but no relation to the group founded by Rockwell).
edges.context: 211 Crew merged with Aryan Syndicate to form the Aryan Empire.

edges.evidence_quote: Eventually 2-11 merged with the Colorado prison gangs Aryan Syndicate and ANP (American Nazi Party but no relation to the group founded by Rockwell).
edges.context: 211 Crew merged with ANP to form the Aryan Empire.

edges.evidence_quote: Due to a threatening letter sent by a Texas Aryan Brotherhood member, it was suspected to be linked to similar assassinations of Texas district attorney Mike McLelland, and his assistant prosecutor Mark Hasse
edges.context: A Texas Aryan Brotherhood member sent a threatening letter that led to suspicion of a link between 211 Crew and the assassinations.
